CustomField.formula:
Planned_Installation_Date__c + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '2 Days'), 2 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '4 Days'), 4 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '6 Days'), 6 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '8 Days'), 8 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '10 Days'), 10 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '12 Days'), 12 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '14 Days'), 14 , 0)) +
(if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '7 Days'), 7 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '15'), 15 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '15 Days'), 15 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '30 Days'), 30 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '60 Days'), 60 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '90 Days'), 90 , 0)) + (if(ISPICKVAL(POC_Duration__c, '120 Days'), 120 , 0))
CustomField.label: POC completion date
